title: paul russells 2400W Steam Iron - Continuous 30g/min Steam, 240V Variable Output, Anti-Drip/Anti-Calc Filter, Vertical Jet Steam Boost, 250ml Water Tank, Power Indicator Light
features: Powerful Steam Performance: Paul Russells 2400-watt iron ensures a rapid warm-up and exceptional performance, leaving garments impeccably smooth and wrinkle-free. Enjoy continuous steam production of up to 30g/min and a convenient steam boost for efficient ironing.

Durable Aluminium Soleplate: The long-lasting Aluminium soleplate effortlessly glides over clothes, preventing sticking or scratching. Easy to clean, this iron provides a hassle-free and enjoyable ironing experience, ensuring the longevity of your clothing.

Drip-Stop System: Say goodbye to water droplet leaks with the iron's drip-stop function. Experience stain-free ironing at any temperature, providing accuracy and confidence during pressing for impeccable results.

Vertical Steaming Convenience: Ideal for hanging materials like clothes or drapes, the vertical steaming feature revitalizes items straight off the hangers. Say goodbye to the ironing board and effortlessly remove wrinkles with ease.

Integrated Calc-Clean Slider: Simplify maintenance with the integrated Calc-Clean slider, making it easy to eliminate calcium deposits or limescale. This feature extends the iron's useful life, preserving its efficiency for long-lasting performance.
Safety and Warranty Assurance: Paul Russell's 3-year warranty assures quality and prompt support for any concerns. Consider investing in a reliable iron that prioritizes customer satisfaction.
description: Product Description Paul Russells 2400Watt Steam Iron Paul Russells 2400Watt powered iron delivers consistent steam power for optimal wrinkle removal, while its robust steam boost effectively tackles stubborn creases, making ironing faster and easier. This iron ensures smooth operation by featuring a convenient 250ml water tank, a comfortable soft grip, and a non-stick soleplate with steam tip and button groove. Its intelligent steam temperature control is tailored for different fabric types, offering preset settings for cotton, silk, and other materials. With variable steam options including vertical steam for large items, spray and steam functionality, and a powerful steam burst, effortlessly smooth out wrinkles on all fabrics with minimal exertion. VERTICAL STEAM FUNCTION, SELF CLEAN & VARIABLE TEMPERATURE CONTROL With its potent vertical steam feature, this iron is perfect for eliminating wrinkles from hanging garments, curtains, and upholstery, offering precise control over the steam intensity. The self-cleaning function prevents limescale buildup, ensuring continued efficiency. Adjusting the temperature based on fabric type is effortless with the rotatable temperature control feature.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎2400W Rated Power, Anti-Drip, Vertical Jet Steam, Self-Clean, Non-Stick, Auto Shut-Off, Ultra Lightweight, Power Indicator Light, Spray Function, Steam 30g/min, Steam Boost.
